task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or welcome screen is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Safety Follow-up' event definition for the 'DM-TRIAL-2024' study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Event Definitions list or the configuration page specifically for the 'Safety Follow-up' event under the 'DM-TRIAL-2024' study.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Adverse Events' CRF is configured to require a password (Electronic Signature).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRF configuration for 'Adverse Events', the checkbox or dropdown for 'Password Required' (or Electronic Signature) is checked or set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Lab Results' CRF is configured to require Double Data Entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRF configuration for 'Lab Results', the checkbox or dropdown for 'Double Data Entry' is checked or set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Quality of Life' CRF is configured to be optional (Required: No).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRF configuration for 'Quality of Life', the 'Required' setting is unchecked or set to 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify the updated event definition configuration was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the event definition was updated, or the agent is seen clicking the 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Confirm' button on the configuration page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the OpenClinica interface is used for configuration, rather than a terminal window executing SQL commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) are visible and the OpenClinica URL is present, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not run unauthorized scripts to bypass the GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing execution of Python or Bash scripts to update the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target study is 'DM-TRIAL-2024' and the event is 'Safety Follow-up'. The required CRF configurations are: 'Adverse Events' must have Electronic Signature (Password) enabled, 'Lab Results' must have Double Data Entry enabled, and 'Quality of Life' must have Required set to false (No).
